name: Chicken w/ Garlic & Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a charcoal grill.
2. Place the unpeeled garlic cloves in a pan of cold water. Bring to a boil, then lower the heat and simmer for 3-4 minutes. Drain.
3. Peel and finely slice the cooled garlic.
4. Combine the sliced garlic with parsley. Stuff half this mixture under the skin of both chicken halves.
5. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
6. Place the seasoned chicken over hot charcoal and grill for about 5 minutes on each side, or until tender.
7. Meanwhile, melt the butter in a small skillet. Sauté the remaining garlic and parsley mixture with lemon juice until warmed through; do not brown.
8. Arrange the grilled chicken on a serving platter, top with the garlic and parsley sauce, and serve immediately.
